title: Nick Plekhanov Copy 2
content:
Nick’s journey into freediving began as a quest for personal transformation. This path led him to develop a revolutionary teaching methodology that bridges ancient breath practices with modern consciousness research. His approach prioritizes mental expansion and self-discovery over conventional depth targets, opening freediving to seekers at every level.

Through his innovative practice, Nick has guided countless students to breakthrough moments of clarity and self-realization. His sessions create a sanctuary where participants dissolve barriers between mind and body, discovering their authentic potential in the embrace of water.

title: Freediving - Break through the limits of your self
content:
Psyche (ψυχή) — mind, soul

Trans — across, beyond

Dēlos (δήλος) — to make visible

Scandere — to climb

Psychedelic — soul-revealing

Transcendental — beyond limits

Freediving — the art of relaxation underwater

Freediving — the path to inner depth





TranscendentalSpiritualFreediving

Underwater calm to find your true self

Break the limits of your self



What does it mean?

Deep immersion

Freediving is a journey inward. No breathing. No noise. No thoughts. Just you, the silence, and the depth.

No fins and minimum gear to awaken, liberate, and transcend.

It is a simple path to inner peace. You glide into silence, free from noise, and connect with yourself. Through slow breaths and easy movement, you release stress, build calm, and sharpen focus. This practice brings clarity without needing the deep ocean.

Start with deep, slow breaths to center your awareness, grounding you in the moment. As you dive, the water’s stillness frees you from fear and doubt, opening your spirit. In the depth’s silence, you connect with your essence, rising beyond limits to pure clarity. This is your climb to a freer, expansive self.

We begin with breathwork to center your mind, relax your body in water, and find peace within. You’ll grow stronger in life and diving, step by step.

We guide you inward: awaken with breathwork, liberate through presence, and transcend in the dive. No vast ocean is needed to reach your truth.



Ready to Find Your Calm?

Ready to Awaken Your Spirit?

Join us in Phuket, Thailand for freediving that blends easy movement with self-discovery.

Join us in Phuket, Thailand for a freediving journey to awaken your spirit and rise beyond limits.

Perfect for beginners and divers seeking peace.

Crafted for those ready to awaken and grow.


  
    
    Spiritual Pool
    
      Learn freediving the calm way
      
        Beginner-friendly
        Ease stress
        Build relaxation
      
    
    
      Expand your mind underwater
      
        Awaken focus
        Deepen presence
        Find clarity
      
    
     @spiritualfreediving
  
  
    
    Psychedelic Wave
    
      Open water free immersion
      
        Minimal gear
        Full presence
        Your inner space
      
    
    
      Oceanic awakening
      
        Free immersion
        No fins
        Embrace depth
      
    
     @nofins
  


The experience

We offer a perfect space where each dive helps you quiet the mind, expand awareness, and connect with yourself. You may feel joy, clarity, and a deep sense of unity that lasts long after the dive.

The journey

Each dive is a chance to center your mind, release boundaries, and connect with your essence. You’ll surface with clarity, focus, and a deeper sense of self.

Who is it for?

Suitable for newcomers, with a focus on relaxation and self-discovery. Accessible for everyone — no experience needed.

Who’s It For?

For freedivers seeking clarity and growth. No experience needed — just an open mind and a desire to dive deeper.

Join us

Ready to dive deeper into yourself? Let our simple approach guide you where each breath opens new doors.

Begin now

Ready to explore your inner depths? Psychedelic Freediving guides you to clarity and expansion with every dive.

The practice that merges freediving with the mental and spiritual benefits of meditation and self-discovery. By focusing on breath and water awareness, it offers a safe, easy, and powerful experience for anyone seeking to explore their inner depths—naturally.

A fusion of freediving’s focus and the art of inner exploration. It’s a clear, open path to expand awareness, designed for anyone ready to dive into their truth.

Phuket 🇹🇭 Thailand

We came out from the deep
To learn to love, to learn how to live.
That’s why we are here!

♥️
